reason: Technical limitations: The ClickHouse source function contains Exception(ErrorCodes::BAD_ARGUMENTS, ...) which requires ClickHouse infrastructure to compile. Attempted to extract and stub but ran into complex string escaping issues in the test environment. The original tests embed C++ code which the judge flagged - correct rewrite would require properly extracting the actual source function and compiling it standalone, but the string manipulation proved intractable in this environment.
